agents.name: Miks
agents.description: Straight from Croatia, Miks takes the stage channeling pure sound energy. With his infectious passion and sonic powers, he rallies his squad to move as one as they set the tempo on the battlefield together.

abilities.name: M-pulse
abilities.description: EQUIP M-pulse. ALT-FIRE to toggle between Concuss and Healing outputs. FIRE to throw the device. Upon landing, M-pulse sends out sound waves, either Concussing or Healing players.

abilities.name: Harmonize
abilities.description: EQUIP Harmonize. Target an ally and FIRE to activate a Combat Stim on yourself and the ally that refreshes with each kill. ALT-FIRE to grant Combat Stim to yourself.

buffs.raw: +10% Equip speed+10% Fire rate+10% Reload speed+10% Recovery speed

abilities.name: Waveform
abilities.description: EQUIP a Map Targeter. FIRE to set locations. ALT-FIRE to spawn Smokes at selected locations.

duration.raw: 16.75 seconds (includes 0.5-second formation time and 0.5-second expiration time)Expiration warning at 14.75 seconds

abilities.name: Bassquake
abilities.description: EQUIP Bassquake. FIRE to build up and unleash Sonic Radiance forward, knocking back, Deafening, and Slowing players.

agents.name: Veto
agents.description: Empowered by an unstoppable DNA mutation, Senegalese enforcer Veto defies the rules of engagement by nullifying his opponent's powers and technology. On Veto's battlefield, gunplay is your only guarantee.

abilities.name: Crosscut
abilities.description: EQUIP a vortex. FIRE to place on the ground. While in range and looking at the vortex, ACTIVATE to teleport to the vortex. During the BUY PHASE, the vortex can be reclaimed to be REDEPLOYED.

abilities.name: Chokehold
abilities.description: EQUIP a viscous fragment of your mutation. FIRE to throw. The fragment deploys upon hitting the ground, creating a trap to hold enemies in place. Held enemies are Deafened and Decayed. Enemies can destroy the trap before activation.

abilities.name: Interceptor
abilities.description: EQUIP the Interceptor. FIRE to place the Interceptor at projected location. Once placed, RE-USE to activate. Once active, it will destroy any utility that would BOUNCE off a player and/or be destroyed naturally by gunfire. Enemies can destroy the Interceptor.

deployment_time.raw: 0.35 seconds to travel to target location at max deployment distance

distance.raw: 7 meters(Can be reduced if pushed back by terrain)

abilities.name: Evolution
abilities.description: INSTANTLY begin to fully mutate, gaining a combat stim, regeneration, and becoming IMMUNE to all forms of debuffs.

buffs.raw: +10% Equip speed+10% Fire rate+10% Reload speed+10% Recovery speed

agents.name: Waylay
agents.description: Thailand's prismatic radiant Waylay transforms into light itself as she darts across the battlefield, striking down her targets through shards of light before flitting back to safety, all in the blink of an eye.

abilities.name: Saturate
abilities.description: EQUIP a cluster of light. FIRE to throw the cluster, which upon contact with the ground explodes, Hindering nearby players with a powerful movement and weapon slow.

abilities.name: Lightspeed
abilities.description: EQUIP to prepare for a burst of speed. FIRE to dash forward twice. ALT FIRE to dash once. Only your first dash can send you upward.

abilities.name: Refract
abilities.description: INSTANTLY create a beacon of light on the floor. REACTIVATE to speed back to your beacon as a mote of pure light. You are invulnerable as you travel. Refract resets a charge every two kills.

duration.raw: 0.35-2 seconds based on travel distanceMinimum travel duration at travel distances <2.5 metersMaximum travel duration at travel distances >50 meters

abilities.name: Convergent Paths
abilities.description: EQUIP to focus your prismatic power. FIRE to create an afterimage of yourself that projects a beam of light. After a brief delay, you gain a powerful speed boost and the beam expands, Hindering other players in the area.

agents.name: Tejo
agents.description: A veteran intelligence consultant from Colombia, Tejo’s ballistic guidance system pressures the enemy to relinquish their ground - or their lives. His targeted strikes keep opponents off balance and under his heel.

abilities.name: Stealth Drone
abilities.description: EQUIP a stealth drone. FIRE to throw the drone forward, assuming direct control of its movement. FIRE again to trigger a pulse that Suppresses and Reveals enemies hit.

All Platforms.notes: Reveal type has been changed from Snapshot reveal to being fully Revealed Pulse radius decreased from 30m >>> 16m
Fixed a bug where it could push players and give them a speed boost
Fixed an issue where Astra’s concuss always affected the drone as long as the drone had line of sight to the concuss
Fixed an issue where players could boost on Tejo’s Stealth Drone. Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone could not be tagged by Cypher ’s camera .
Fixed a bug where Stealth Drone was not unstealthing upon jumping up prior to its scan.

Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone affected by Nearsight could see Enemy Players’ model outline at certain distances. Fixed an issue where Stealth Drone is slowed outside the AOE of Sage ’s Slow Orb .

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug where it could ride on various projectiles.

abilities.name: Special Delivery
abilities.description: EQUIP a sticky grenade. FIRE to launch. The grenade sticks to the first surface it hits and explodes, Concussing and dealing damage to any targets caught in the blast. ALT FIRE to launch the grenade with a single bounce instead.

abilities.name: Guided Salvo
abilities.description: EQUIP an AR targeting system. FIRE to select up to two target locations on the map. ALT FIRE to launch missiles that autonomously navigate to target locations, detonating repeatedly for damage on arrival.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed an exploit that allowed him to send 3 missiles instead of the standard 2.
Removed area names due to it being too large on ability maps and overlapping due to decreased cast range
Fixed an issue where the rockets could get hindered by Waylay ’s Saturate and Convergent Paths
Cost: 150. Now has 2 charges. Grants a free charge on round start. Each individual rocket used will consume 1 charge. The cooldown has been removed. Map Targeting Range decreased from 55m to 45m.
Max damage decreased from 70 >>> 65 Minimum damage remains unchanged Now does 50% damage to non-player objects.

Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo projectile would get stuck inside the wall when cast towards a path blocked by Sage’s Barrier Orb. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo missile visuals are set to draw as a Cylinder instead of Sphere, showing an incorrect damage zone. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo loses functionality and appears as stuck if he cast it while being outside of the map. Fixed an issue where Guided Salvo damages players on elevation without showing a warning indicator.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV.

damage.raw: Inner radius: 65 per tickOuter radius: 50 per tickTotal 195/150 damagex0.5 multiplier to objects

abilities.name: Armageddon
abilities.description: EQUIP a tactical strike targeting map. FIRE to select the origin point of the strike. FIRE again to set the end point and launch the attack, unleashing a wave of lethal damaging explosions along the strike path. ALT FIRE during map targeting to cancel the origin point.

All Platforms.notes: Removed area names due to it being too large on ability maps and overlapping due to decreased cast range
Swiftplay only (changed in v10.09 ): Starting points 2 >>> 3
Ult points increased from 8 to 9
Fixed an issue where Armageddon VFX may remain after being used. Fixed an issue where there was no danger indicator for players running through Armeggadon from the back side.
Fixed an issue where Armageddon’s floor indicator persisted across rounds.
Fixed a bug where Armageddon’s danger indicator did not always apply on variable elevations
Fixed an issue where players could rarely survive running straight through the full duration of Armageddon
Fixed an issue where players who exited then re-entered Tejo’s Armageddon blast zone do not count as Displaced in the Combat Report.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where its targeting cursor could go outside of the ability map UI. Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV.

area_size.raw: 12-meter width2-meter length per segment16 segments, 32-meter total length

agents.name: Vyse
agents.description: Metallic mastermind Vyse unleashes liquid metal to isolate, trap, and disarm her enemies. Through cunning and manipulation, she forces all who oppose her to fear the battlefield itself.

abilities.name: Razorvine
abilities.description: EQUIP a nest of liquid metal. FIRE to launch. Upon landing, the nest becomes invisible. When ACTIVATED, it sprawls out into a large razorvine nest which slows and damages all players who move through it.

abilities.name: Shear
abilities.description: EQUIP filaments of liquid metal. FIRE to place a hidden wall trap. When an enemy crosses, an indestructible wall bursts from the ground behind them. The wall lasts for a brief time before dissipating.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed a bug where Sova ’s Recon Bolt and KAY/O ’s ZERO/point would get stuck inside an activated wall instead of being destroyed

Trigger logic has been reworked to make it easier to bait out. The wall now spawns immediately when an enemy enters and then leaves its trigger zone. Enemies will also hear an audio cue, audible only to them, when they enter the trigger zone
Fixed an issue where Vyse’s activated Shear wall didn’t display the warning fade out visual cue. Fixed an issue where Vyse’s Shear wall blocked bullets after the visual wall despawned.

Fixed an issue where enemies could get stuck inside Vyse’s wall if the wall was overlapping with a smoke ability at specific times. Fixed an issue where enemies could get stuck in Vyse’s Shear if they jumped when it was triggered. Fixed an issue where Vyse’s Shear’s SFX could get stuck playing for enemies after moving out of range or if Vyse dies.
Triggered Wall Duration: 8s >>> 6s

Fixed an issue where Yoru ’s Fakeout did not trigger Shear Fixed an issue where Breach was unable to cast abilities through Shear. Fixed an issue where Sova ’s Recon Bolt was destroyed by Shear. Fixed an issue where Gekko ’s Thrash and Raze ’s Showstopper could hit people on the other side of Shear. Fixed various collision issues with Vyse’s Shear, that blocked bullets and people while despawning. Fixed rare instances of people’s bodies being clipped inside Vyse’s Shear. Fixed an issue where Shear had lingering VFX when canceling early.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug where it was sometimes destroying Gekko ’s Thrash , Skye ’s Trailblazer , Sova ’s Owl Drone , and Tejo ’s Stealth Drone instead of pushing them aside.

Console-only.notes: Fixed an issue where KAY/O 's ZERO/point was destroyed by Shear. Fixed an issue where Shear's collision would linger after being placed on sloped surfaces. Fixed an issue where Shear could extend over gaps improperly. Fixed instances where Shear's destruction voice line was not properly playing.

abilities.name: Arc Rose
abilities.description: EQUIP an Arc Rose. Target a surface and FIRE to place a stealthed Arc Rose, or ALT FIRE to place the Arc Rose through it. REUSE to blind all players looking at it. This ability can be picked up to be REDEPLOYED.

All Platforms.notes: Now destructible after the flash windup starts rather than being invulnerable. When enemy players are successfully flashed, the audio cue and voiceline alerting Vyse and her allies is removed Flash duration decreased from 2.25s → 2.0s After destruction, cooldown is increased from 45s → 60s Recalling the ability will now always incur a 20s cooldown
Fixed an issue where hit confirm would play when affecting non-players Fixed an issue where Vyse could no longer use Arc Rose for the remainder of the round if it was placed too close to the spike
Fixed an issue where the cooldown on Vyse’s Arc Rose was not properly set after it was destroyed.

Fixed a bug where Vyse’s Arc Rose idle animation stopped looping when she crouched. Fixed a bug where destroying the Arc Rose while Vyse was recalling it did not respect the 40 second “destroyed” cooldown.
Fixed an issue where Arc Rose was visible when placed on specific water surfaces.
Equip speed after cast: Normal >>> Fast
Fixed an issue where Arc Rose could be placed on invalid objects.

Console-only.notes: Fixed an issue where Arc Rose could not be placed on some map walls during the Buy Phase. Fixed instances of Arc Rose voice line being cut off prematurely.

abilities.name: Steel Garden
abilities.description: EQUIP a bramble of liquid metal. FIRE to send the metal erupting from you as a torrent of metal thorns, JAMMING enemy primary weapons after a brief windup.

All Platforms.notes: Radius increased from 26m >>> 28m
Initial windup increased from 3.4s → 4.4s Radius decreased from 32.5m → 26m
Fixed issue where the audio could trigger twice after Observers swap targets.
Fixed an issue where Vyse’s Steel Garden warning indicator did not properly match the debuff area.

AOE windup audio integration have been updated from being positioned directly on the Agent when in the AOE to being slightly directional toward the origin of the AOE to allow you to know which direction to travel in, in order to escape.

Console-only.notes: [PS5] Fixed rare client crash instances related to Steel Garden.

agents.name: Clove
agents.description: Scottish troublemaker Clove makes mischief for enemies in both the heat of combat and the cold of death. The young immortal keeps foes guessing, even from beyond the grave, their return to the living only ever a moment away.

abilities.name: Pick-me-up
abilities.description: ACTIVATE to absorb the life force of a fallen enemy that Clove damaged or killed, gaining haste and temporary health.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed a bug where their total health pool was displaying 151 instead of 150 when overhealed
Fixed a bug where the overheal UI effects would persist on the HUD even after the overheal had been reduced to 0
Overheal reduced from 100 HP → 50 HP
Fixed an issue where the cast sound was silent for enemies.
Visuals updated to show when Clove’s speed boost is active
Fixed an issue where the audio wouldn’t play properly for all players.
Fixed an issue where Clove’s Pick-me-up duration was incorrect for observer/spectator clients.
Health buff duration increased from 8s >>> 10s Move speed duration reduced from 8s >>> 3s
Fixed issues where Clove could tank lethal damage specifically when Regen Shield and Pick-me-up were active at the same time.
Cost 100 >>> 200 Duration 10s >>> 8s Damaging Assist Time to activate 10s >>> 6s Fixed an issue where Clove’s Pick-me-up could not proc on training range bots
Fixed issues where the timer for Pick-me-up could be restarted which would allow Clove to have more time than intended to activate the ability.

Speculative fix for Pick-me-up HUD sometimes showing > 150 total health values when taking fall damage as Clove activated the ability. Fixed a bug where damage to Pick-me-up temporary health did not appear in Combat Report.

PC-only.notes: Team Deathmatch only: Fixed a bug where the overheal would sometimes not give health when they died previously with the buff active.

abilities.name: Meddle
abilities.description: EQUIP a fragment of immortality essence. FIRE to throw the fragment, which upon landing on the floor, erupts after a short delay and temporarily Decays all targets caught inside.

decay_rates.raw: Decay: 90 HP over 0.75 seconds (120 HP/s)Restoration: 90 HP over 1.75 seconds (51 HP/s)

windup.raw: 0.75 seconds after in contact with ground

abilities.name: Ruse
abilities.description: EQUIP a view of the battlefield. FIRE to set the locations where Clove's clouds will settle. ALT FIRE to confirm, launching clouds that block vision in the chosen areas. Clove can use this ability after death.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed a bug where post-death Ruse could not be unequipped without casting it.
Smoke duration 14s >> 6s when casted while dead
Charges are now restricted to 1 maximum when Clove is dead
Fixed an issue where Clove’s Ruse battlefield view could be seen from underneath elevated locations while they have it equipped.
Cooldown duration increased from 30s >>> 40s
Enemy smokes updated to appear more red than ally smokes Visual cues have been added to the inside of the smoke before it expires.
Can now ping and see additional icons on maps used for ability targeting
Fixed an issue where players inside Clove’s smoke forming location were at a disadvantage compared to players on the outside of the smoke.
Fixed Clove's icons being incorrect when Ruse was equipped.

Fixed a bug where Ruse used after death does not report to the Match Details. Fixed a bug where Clove’s head and arm hitboxes could be offset when aiming sharply up or down, and while crouched with Ruse equipped. Fixed a bug where moving through the edges of Clove’s smoke would cause flickering vision rather than a smooth transition.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV.

Console-only.notes: Added Agent-specific cursor curve settings for map ability controls.

duration.raw: Alive: 14 seconds (includes 0.5-second formation time and 0.5-second expiration time)Expiration warning at 12 seconds

abilities.name: Not Dead Yet
abilities.description: After dying, ACTIVATE to resurrect. Once resurrected, Clove must earn a kill or a damaging assist within a set time or they will die. REACTIVATE to cancel early.

agents.name: Iso
agents.description: Chinese fixer for hire Iso goes into a flow state to dismantle the opposition. Reconfiguring ambient energy into bulletproof protection, he advances with focus towards his next duel to the death.

abilities.name: Contingency
abilities.description: EQUIP to assemble prismatic energy. FIRE to push an indestructible wall of energy forward that blocks bullets. ALT FIRE to push out a slower version of the wall.

duration.raw: 5.4 seconds total4.6 seconds at full size

abilities.name: Undercut
abilities.description: EQUIP a molecular bolt. Fire to throw it forward, briefly applying Vulnerable & Suppress to all players it touches. The bolt can pass through solid objects, including walls.

abilities.name: Double Tap
abilities.description: INSTANTLY start channeling your focus. Once focused: gain a shield which absorbs one instance of damage from any source, reload more quickly, and enter a flow state during which downed enemies you kill or damage spawn an energy orb. Shooting this orb refreshes your flow state and your existing shield, or grants another.

All Platforms.notes: Updated Iso’s Double Tap tooltip to mention the reload speed buff.
Fixed an issue where swapping to Iso with Double Tap active could result in the wrong UI bar displaying for spectators or observers.
Fixed a bug where Double Tap’s HUD bar could look visually incorrect for spectators or observers
Iso now receives a Heavy Penetration tag rather than a Wall Penetration tag when the shield is broken. This means he’s slowed more upon his shield breaking.
Duration: 20s >>> 12s Signature kill reset removed
Fixed an issue with Iso's orb spawn logic after he disconnects

Iso now grants himself a shield upon finishing a 1 second animation during which he can’t use his gun. This plays a shield forming sound at the end of the channel when the shield is activated. Charges 2 >>> 1 Kill reset added to Double Tap (Iso gets a charge back if he gets 2 kills). Iso now receives a Wall Penetration tag instead of a standard Heavy Penetration tag when the shield is broken. This means he’s slowed less upon his shield breaking. Additionally, Iso now gets a damage indicator towards the direction of the enemy that broke the shield Iso can now recast Double Tap while it’s active to refresh the duration of the shield. This is relevant if he gets a refreshed charge of his Double Tap from getting 2 kills.
Shootable orb duration increased 2 >>> 3 seconds Initial buff and shield duration increased 15 >>> 20 Shield width reduced 120 >>> 100

PC-only.notes: Fixed an issue where Iso's shield hitbox could be misaligned.

abilities.name: Kill Contract
abilities.description: EQUIP an interdimensional arena. FIRE to hurl a column of energy through the battlefield, pulling and healing both you and the first enemy hit into the arena to duel to the death.
abilities.reequip_speed: Fast (No target + Arena entry + Arena exit)

agents.name: Deadlock
agents.description: Norwegian operative Deadlock deploys an array of cutting-edge nanowire to secure the battlefield from even the most lethal assault. No one escapes her vigilant watch, nor survives her unyielding ferocity.

abilities.name: Barrier Mesh
abilities.description: EQUIP a Barrier Mesh disc. FIRE to throw forward. Upon landing, the disc generates barriers from the origin point that block character movement.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down
Cost reduced from 400 → 300 Health of smaller nodes decreased from 570 → 480
Fixed an issue where Deadlock’s Barrier Mesh was not playing hit audio when shooting the center node. Fixed an issue where Deadlock’s Barrier Mesh could be used to boost players.
Changed to a non-signature ability. Cost: Free >>> 400 credits
Visuals for health on the Barrier Mesh have been updated to make their health states more clear
Increased the max length Barrier Mesh walls 6m >>> 10m
Fixed issues where damage-over-time area abilities were not damaging Barrier Mesh.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug where the walls were sometimes invisible if placed when experiencing packet loss.

duration.raw: Total 30 seconds (Includes deploy time)Begins to decay after 25 seconds

abilities.name: Sonic Sensor
abilities.description: EQUIP a Sonic Sensor. FIRE to deploy. The sensor monitors an area for enemies making sound. It concusses that area if footsteps, weapons fire, or significant noise are detected. This ability can be picked up to be REDEPLOYED.
abilities.affects_allies: Yes (if within same range as enemy)

abilities.name: GravNet
abilities.description: EQUIP a GravNet grenade. FIRE to throw. ALT FIRE to lob. The GravNet detonates upon landing, forcing any characters caught within to crouch and move slowly.

abilities.name: Annihilation
abilities.description: EQUIP a Nanowire Accelerator. FIRE to unleash a pulse of nanowires that captures the first enemy contacted. The cocooned enemy is pulled along a nanowire path and will die unless they are freed. The nanowire cocoon is destructible.

agents.name: Gekko
agents.voice_actors: Alejandro Antonio Ruiz (Gekko) Paul Guyet (Mosh) Kellen Goff (Wingman) Jan Johns (Dizzy & Thrash)
agents.description: Gekko the Angeleno leads a tight-knit crew of calamitous creatures. His buddies bound forward, scattering enemies out of the way, with Gekko chasing them down to regroup and go again.

abilities.name: Globules
abilities.description: When Gekko's abilities expire they revert into a dormant globule. INTERACT to reclaim the globule and gain another charge after a short cooldown. Thrash can only be reclaimed once.

abilities.name: Mosh Pit
abilities.description: EQUIP Mosh. FIRE to throw Mosh like a grenade. ALT FIRE to lob. Upon landing Mosh duplicates across a large area that deals a small amount of damage over time then after a short delay explodes.

abilities.name: Wingman
abilities.description: EQUIP Wingman. FIRE to send Wingman forward seeking enemies. Wingman unleashes a Concussive blast toward the first enemy he sees. ALT FIRE when targeting a Spike site or planted Spike to have Wingman defuse or plant the Spike. To plant, Gekko must have the Spike in his inventory.
abilities.deployment_type: Grounded Object Placement (Spike plant) Targeted (Spike defuse)
abilities.affects_allies: Yes (if within same range as enemy)

abilities.name: Dizzy
abilities.description: EQUIP Dizzy. FIRE to send Dizzy soaring forward through the air. Dizzy charges then unleashes plasma blasts at enemies in line of sight. Enemies hit by her plasma are Blinded.
abilities.affects_allies: Yes (if within same range as enemy)

duration.raw: Total 2 seconds1 second at max potency1 second to fade away

abilities.name: Thrash
abilities.description: EQUIP Thrash. FIRE to link with Thrash's mind and steer her through enemy territory. ACTIVATE to lunge forward and explode, Detaining any players in a small radius.

agents.name: Harbor
agents.description: Hailing from India's coast, Harbor storms the field wielding ancient technology with dominion over water. He unleashes frothing rapids and crushing waves to shield his allies, or pummel those that oppose him.

abilities.name: Storm Surge
abilities.description: EQUIP Storm Surge. FIRE to throw, creating an explosive whirlpool that Slows and Nearsights enemies within it after a short duration.

abilities.name: High Tide
abilities.description: EQUIP High Tide. FIRE to send water forward along the ground. HOLD FIRE to guide the water towards your crosshair spawning a vision blocking Screen along the path. ALT FIRE to stop the water early. All players crossing High Tide are Slowed.

All Platforms.notes: Wall height increased 6m >> 8m Max wall length increased from 50m to 60m
Ability slot changed from Signature >>> Basic Now costs 300 credits
Now slows enemy dashes
Fixed an issue where the wall would end prematurely.
Fixed an issue where AI-controlled abilities (e.g., Killjoy ’s Turret ) could detect you through High Tide.
Duration increased 12s >>> 15s
Fixed a bug where High Tide would have large gaps when cast in specific map locations.

Console-only.notes: Can be set to Togglable in the Agent Profile Settings, allowing you to press and let go of the input to steer the ability freely while it’s active

abilities.name: Cove
abilities.description: EQUIP Cove. ACTIVATE to form a water Smoke in the select location. HOLD FIRE while targeting to move the marker further away and HOLD ALT FIRE to move it closer. RELOAD to toggle targeting view. REACTIVATE to Shield the water Smoke, blocking any bullets that hit it. The Shielded water Smoke can be destroyed.

All Platforms.notes: Cooldown decreased 40s >> 30s Smoke duration increased from 15s >>> 19.25s Health increased from 500 to 680 Harbor now re-equips his gun faster after activation
Fixed a bug where it was missing an ability icon when viewing it on the placement minimap.
Fixed a bug where it would snap rotate 180 degrees when looking upwards or downwards

EQUIP Cove. ACTIVATE to form a water Smoke in the select location. HOLD FIRE while targeting to move the marker further away and HOLD ALT FIRE to move it closer. RELOAD to toggle targeting view. REACTIVATE to Shield the water Smoke, blocking any bullets that hit it. The Shielded water Smoke can be destroyed. UNDOCUMENTED : Shield HP decay towards end duration removed Ability slot changed from Basic >>> Signature Now 1 free charge on a 40-second cooldown Now grants assists for players killed while affected by it. Viper ’s Snake Bite , Brimstone ’s Incendiary , Sova ’s Hunter's Fury , and Killjoy ’s Nanoswarm should properly damage it
Improved visual clarity of shield health states. The health state is now more reflected in the visual water animation.
Fixed an issue where bullet tracers could be seen passing through
Fixed a bug where walking through Cove was not blinding players at the intended distance

Console-only.notes: Fixed an issue where AimAssist was incorrectly being applied when it was equipped.

abilities.name: Reckoning
abilities.description: EQUIP Reckoning. FIRE to unleash the full power of your artifact, releasing a surge of water that barrels forward to Nearsight and Slow enemies that are hit.
abilities.affects_allies: Yes (if within same range as enemy)

All Platforms.notes: Wave speed increased by 25% Can now re-use the ultimate to stop it in place for 7s.
Fixed a bug where the overworld range indicator was not lining up with the actual ability.
Slow duration increased from 0.6s >>> 2s

Fixed a bug where the minimap indicator would briefly linger and block vision cones Fixed a bug where it would display colored boxes on a spectator’s screen if they changed perspectives to someone who was just hit by one of the abilities
EQUIP Reckoning. FIRE to unleash the full power of your artifact, releasing a surge of water that barrels forward to Nearsight and Slow enemies that are hit.

Reduced visual noise. Updated ground indicator to more clearly show its impact range. The yellow wisp is now closer to the Agent being hit, so it’s easier to see where someone is hiding before the concuss comes down. Shortened water splash on the ground for visibility.
Fixed a bug where geysers would not spawn on the area where the player was standing.

PC-only.notes: Fixed a bug where VFX indicator lines were not lined up with the hit box. Fixed a bug where SFX would persist between rounds

agents.name: Fade
agents.description: Turkish bounty hunter Fade unleashes the power of raw nightmare to seize enemy secrets. Attuned with terror itself, she hunts down targets and reveals their deepest fears - before crushing them in the dark.

abilities.name: Terror Trail
abilities.description: Abilities that apply Terror Trail Mark enemies, causing their position and movements to be tracked by dark mist. Prowlers can be used to pursue trails.

abilities.name: Prowler
abilities.description: EQUIP a prowler. FIRE to send the prowler forward. HOLD FIRE to steer the prowler towards your crosshair. The prowler will chase down the first enemy or terror trail it sees, and Nearsight the enemy on impact.

travel_speeds.raw: 10 meters/second (Initial)12 meters/second (Agent detected)15 meters/second (Terror Trail detected)

abilities.name: Seize
abilities.description: EQUIP a knot of raw fear. FIRE to throw. The knot drops down after a set time. RE-USE to drop the knot early. The knot ruptures on impact, holding nearby enemies in place. Held enemies are Deafened, and Decayed.

abilities.name: Haunt
abilities.description: EQUIP a haunting watcher. FIRE to throw. The watcher drops down after a set time. RE-USE to drop the watcher early. The watcher lashes out on impact, Revealing enemies in its line of sight and creating terror trails to them. Enemies can destroy the watcher.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down
Cooldown increased from 40s → 60s Haunt active duration decreased 2s → 1.5s
Will no longer take damage from allied Hunter's Fury
Now immune to all allied damage
Can no longer reactive Haunt if it is still airborne while Fade is suppressed
Fixed issue causing Haunt to sometimes reveal enemies that were on the other side of a thin wall
Fixed a bug where revealed agents would sometimes briefly appear in an incorrect location on the minimap

Console-only.notes: Fixed an issue where Haunt did not properly apply AimAssist to Revealed Targets.

abilities.name: Nightfall
abilities.description: EQUIP the power of nightmare itself. FIRE to unleash a wave of unstoppable nightmare energy. Enemies caught in the wave are Marked by terror trails, Deafened, and Decayed.

All Platforms.notes: Fixed a bug where its minimap indicator was slightly smaller than the actual ability.
Deafen and Marked duration decreased from 12s → 8s Width decreased from 24m → 20m Decay now remains a consistent 80 damage over its duration instead of decreasing over time
Fixed an issue where the visual indicator wouldn’t disappear for spectators if Fade dies with the ability equips.
Fixed an issue where Fade’s hands got stuck in place if she crouched while holding Nightfall out.

Art update for debuff VFX This was initially documented in v8.02 as part of a miscellaneous change affecting the Decay debuff overall but it was not active on Nightfall until 8.04. The fix itself is undocumented .
Cost increased 7 >>> 8
Decreased amount of flickering textures on diagonal walls when casting Added VFX for additional clarity and visual impact

Console-only.notes: Fixed an issue where AimAssist was incorrectly being applied when it was equipped.

agents.name: Neon
agents.description: Filipino Agent, Neon, surges forward at shocking speeds, discharging bursts of bioelectric radiance as fast as her body generates it. She races ahead to catch enemies off guard, then strikes them down quicker than lightning.

abilities.name: Energy
